query: backlit silhouette obscured anonymous figure against bright window subject in shadow
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: backlit silhouette — anonymous figures, identity erased by exposure choice, sinister window-light contrejour

response.objective_caption: A silhouetted figure stands behind a metal mesh screen on an elevated walkway or bridge, framed by vertical support beams and a horizontal railing. Intense golden backlighting from a bright circular source behind the beams floods the background, casting the person and foreground architecture into deep shadow and creating a stark contrast between the luminous yellow-orange background and the dark grid pattern of the screen.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A heavily grainy, textured photograph of a silhouetted figure behind a metal mesh screen on an elevated walkway, suffused with an oppressive sickly yellow-orange tint reminiscent of sodium vapor lighting. Extreme backlighting blows out the background into a blinding highlight while crushing the figure and structural beams into opaque black shadows, creating severe exposure extremes. The heavy analog film grain, harsh tonal separation, and solitary framing generate an atmosphere of isolation, melancholy, and atmospheric distress.
